I moved some of the sandbags out of the way. That should make it
easier to get to the western district.
D-Demons really exist! It's like I'm trapped in a nightmare!
The demons told us to keep working our jobs same as always.
I guess they don't want the whole country falling to ruin.
The path up ahead's blocked with rubble from the battle.
Thanks to the demons, the church is a complete mess. Well, it was
actually the knights who tore it apart for their battle plans.
Shit! The town's in ruins! Curse those demons!
They timed their attack to coincide with the centennial festival...
They really are underhanded and disgusting.
What's going to happen to us now? I heard them talking about
world domination... They can't be serious, right?
The demons told me to keep protecting Bohelos like I always
The Kingdom of Bohelos, a country of peace and equality... I guess
the only thing that's changed is that we're ruled by demons now.
